question: List all concert names and their locations
What is the average age of all singers?
Find the name and country of singers older than 40
gold_sql: SELECT Name, Country FROM singer WHERE Age > 40;

question: List all singers ordered by age from youngest to oldest
gold_sql: SELECT * FROM singer ORDER BY Age ASC;

question: Count how many concerts were held in each location
gold_sql: SELECT Location, COUNT(*) FROM concert GROUP BY Location;

question: Find singers who performed in concerts in 2015
gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT s.Name FROM singer s JOIN singer_in_concert sc ON s.Singer_ID = sc.Singer_ID JOIN concert c ON sc.Concert_ID = c.Concert_ID WHERE c.Year = 2015;

question: What is the name of the youngest singer?
gold_sql: SELECT Name FROM singer ORDER BY Age LIMIT 1;
